articles.author: Rudy Lu
articles.title: War-driven energy crisis boosts China’s sales pitch for renewable tech - The Washington Post
articles.description: Sales of Chinese electric vehicles and solar panels have surged since the start of the Iran war, companies say.
articles.content:
TAIPEI, Taiwan As the oil and gas crisis set off by the war in Iran drives governments to accelerate their transitions to renewable energy, one country above all stands to benefit.
China dominates r… [+316 chars]
